content.text: {"utterances":["Look at the large yellow cube in the left column, row 4 (middle-lower).","Find the yellow cube at column 1, row 4—it's the only large yellow cube there.","The target is the large yellow cube positioned at row 4, far left (column 1).","Go to row 4 and the leftmost column; you’ll see a large yellow cube."]}
